cobblemon.species.coldeon.name: Coldeon
cobblemon.species.coldeon.desc: A master of mental ice, it freezes opponents with psychic waves as cold as absolute zero.
cobblemon.species.devileon.name: Devileon
cobblemon.species.devileon.desc: Its dark fur is perpetually warm. It exhales a black flame that consumes the life force of its prey.
cobblemon.species.gloweon.name: Gloweon
cobblemon.species.gloweon.desc: The bioluminescent patterns on its body react to its psychic power, illuminating the dark ocean depths.
cobblemon.species.lanterneon.name: Lanterneon
cobblemon.species.lanterneon.desc: It uses the golden rings on its body to lure prey in the abyss before striking with water-pressurized attacks.
cobblemon.species.lyopheon.name: Lyopheon
cobblemon.species.lyopheon.desc: Its crystalline tail can freeze entire ponds in seconds. It is said to guide lost sailors through blizzards at sea.
cobblemon.species.nateon.name: Nateon
cobblemon.species.nateon.desc: By dancing in forest clearings, it releases spores that accelerate plant growth and soothe angry hearts.
cobblemon.species.obleon.name: Obleon
cobblemon.species.obleon.desc: A bridge between shadow and light, it uses its ribbons to sense the aura of the moon and stars.
cobblemon.species.oracleon.name: Oracleon
cobblemon.species.oracleon.desc: The flickering flames on its forehead allow it to see 10 seconds into the future, making it nearly impossible to hit.
cobblemon.species.soleon.name: Soleon
cobblemon.species.soleon.desc: It gathers solar energy during the day to unleash devastating electric bursts at night. Its fur crackles with static heat.
cobblemon.species.steameon.name: Steameon
cobblemon.species.steameon.desc: Its body temperature is so high that water turns to steam instantly upon contact, creating a permanent defensive fog.
cobblemon.move.spiritburn.desc: A spectral fire that burns the soul. It is super effective against Ghost and Psychic types.
cobblemon.move.iceage.desc: A powerful freezing blast that chills the entire battlefield, lowering the Special Defense of all Pokémon.
cobblemon.move.floralshield.desc: The user creates a defensive barrier of flowers that raises its Defense. If Grassy Terrain is active, the user also restores HP.
cobblemon.move.oracleflare.desc: The user releases a mysterious flame that has a 30% chance to confuse the target.
cobblemon.move.aurorachill.desc: The user chills the air to summon Snow for 5 turns. If it is already snowing, it sets up an Aurora Veil to protect the team.
cobblemon.move.psychicpuddle.desc: The user creates a puddle of psychic energy. If used under Rain, it sets up a Psychic Terrain for 2 turns.
